original_abstract: The term "Smart Classroom" has evolved over time and nowadays reflects the tech- nological advancements incorporated in educational spaces. The rapid advances in technology, and the need to create more efficient and creative classes that support both in-class and remote activities, have led to the integration of Artificial Intelligence and smart technologies in smart classes. In this paper we discuss the concept of Artifi- cial Intelligence in Education and present a literature review related to smart classroom technology, with an emphasis on emerging technologies such as AI-related technolo- gies. As part of this survey key technologies related to smart classes used for effective class management that enhance the convenience of classroom environments, the use of different types of smart teaching aids during the educational process and the use of automated performance assessment technologies are presented. Apart from discuss- ing a variety of technological accomplishments in each of the aforementioned areas, the role of AI is discussed, allowing the readers to comprehend the importance of AI in key technologies related to smart classes. Furthermore, through a SWOT analysis, the Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats of adopting AI in smart classes are presented, while the future perspectives and challenges in utilizing AI-based tech- niques in smart classes are discussed. This survey targets educators and AI professionals so that the former get informed about the potential, and limitations of AI in education, while the latter can get inspiration from the challenges and peculiarities of educational AI-based systems.
humanized_abstract: The term Smart Classroom has undergone several interpretations over the years, and currently, it means equipping the educational space with the latest technology. Today, due to the fast-paced progress of technology, and in order to create a more effective and creative class for in-class and remote learning, educators are using Artificial Intelligence and smart technologies in smart classes. This paper examines the concept of Artificial Intelligence in Education and presents a literature review related to smart classroom technologies and emerging technologies such as AI. The findings of the survey are presented in three main sections related to the key technologies of smart classes including effective class management technologies that improve the convenience of the classroom environment and smart teaching aids and automated performance assessment technologies that are used during the educational process. In addition to the technological achievements mentioned in each of these sections, the role of AI in these technologies is also explained to help readers understand the importance of AI in the key technologies of smart classes. The Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats (SWOT) analysis of using AI in smart classes are also presented, and finally, future perspectives and challenges of using AI-based technologies in smart classes are explained. Therefore, this survey is mainly for teachers and AI developers to inspire them by introducing the advantages and disadvantages of AI in education.
